sections.description: Vitest test files for frontend utility functions.
sections.purpose: Unit tests for pure utility functions (format.ts, heatmap.ts) to verify formatting logic and heatmap level computation.
strengths: Tests cover edge cases: zero, negative, boundary values
weaknesses: Only covers utility functions; no tests for API client, composables, or Vue components
sections.test_coverage: format.test.ts: 11 tests covering fmtNum (billions, millions, thousands, small, zero), fmtCost (dollars, cents, sub-cent), fmtDuration (hours, minutes, seconds). heatmap.test.ts: 4 tests covering computeLevels (all zeros, empty array, percentile-based levels, negative values).
sections.functionality: Vitest unit tests for utility modules. Run via `npm test` or `npx vitest run`.
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| format.test.ts | Tests for fmtNum, fmtCost, fmtDuration |
| heatmap.test.ts | Tests for computeLevels |
